topic: A front porch grows one extra step every month until the staircase descends below street level.
title: My Porch Keeps Growing One More Step | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My front porch had three steps when I bought the house. This morning it had eleven.
scenes.image_prompt: a wooden front porch staircase descending far lower than the surrounding yard, fog, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a normal blue house on a normal street.
scenes.image_prompt: a small blue two story house on a quiet suburban street, overcast sky, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three steps. I counted them every day for years.
scenes.image_prompt: three weathered wooden porch steps leading to a front door, soft shadow, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning there were four. I told myself I had miscounted.
scenes.image_prompt: four wooden porch steps photographed from above, the bottom one paler than the rest, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
a longer wooden porch staircase of seven steps, the yard sloping oddly around it, fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new step appeared every month, always at the bottom, always older than the rest.
scenes.image_prompt: the lowest porch step weathered gray and cracked beneath newer boards, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked the street level with chalk and waited.
scenes.image_prompt: a white chalk line drawn across the curb beside a porch staircase, dim overcast light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the staircase passed below the street.
scenes.image_prompt: a wooden staircase continuing downward past the level of the asphalt road, into shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The bottom steps now end in cold air and a smell like wet stone.
scenes.image_prompt: lower porch steps descending into a dark pit of cold mist below ground level, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I heard footsteps climbing up, slow, one step at a time.
scenes.image_prompt: a long dark porch staircase descending into blackness, faint dust disturbed on a lower step, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the door locked. The footsteps stop just below the count I can see.
scenes.image_prompt: a locked front door behind a porch railing, staircase falling away into fog below, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning there were twelve steps. Whatever is climbing is almost level with me now.
scenes.image_prompt: the top of a porch staircase, the topmost step worn smooth by something, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
